paper_title: Material and Methods of Fossil and Lithic Analysis

methods.description: This method describes the storage locations of fossils and lithics analyzed in the study, which were collected during archeopaleontological interventions in the 1950s and 1960s.

steps.description: The fossils from Arenero de Pedro Jaro I are stored in the MAN and MSI, and those from Arenero de Orcasitas are stored in the MSI, MAN and a few specimens in the MAR.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify storage locations for fossils from Arenero de Pedro Jaro I and Arenero de Orcasitas

steps.description: The specimens from Transfesa are stored in the MNCN and MAR, and those from Manuel Soto in the MSI.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify storage locations for specimens from Transfesa and Manuel Soto

methods.description: This method involves comparing fossil specimens with others, both recent and fossil, and measuring them using established methods.

steps.description: The fossil specimens are compared with others, both recent and fossil indicated in Table 4.
steps.searchable_summary: Compare fossil specimens with recent and fossil specimens listed in Table 4

steps.description: The methods of study of the Cervidae and the way of measuring (Table 6) are similar to those used by Van der Made and Tong (2008).
steps.searchable_summary: Measure Cervidae fossils using methods similar to Van der Made and Tong (2008)

steps.description: The measurements in the figures and in Tables 7 and 8 are in millimeters.
steps.searchable_summary: Record measurements in millimeters for figures and Tables 7 and 8
